_comment: Copy to name_corrections.json (gitignored) to fix misheard/misspelled proper names. Each canonical spelling maps to a list of known variants; a conservative fuzzy matcher also catches new close variants. Used to correct voice + typed input and to bias Whisper.
_ignore_comment: Optional: words the fuzzy matcher must NEVER auto-correct. Common English words and common first names are already protected (so 'Mark' won't become 'Marik'); add anything specific to you here — e.g. coworkers or terms close to a fantasy name.
